    Located in Southwest Edmonton

    Serving the Edmonton community since 1991

    Heritage Village Dental Clinic has been serving the families of Southwest Edmonton since 1991. Our dentists, Dr. Alex Fong and Dr. Bernie Kan are supported by a courteous and professional staff that strives to provide you with the best possible experience. we offer comprehensive dental care for the whole family.

    Caring Team Members

    Here for all your dental needs!

    Whether it’s a routine check-up and cleaning, cosmetic enhancement emergency treatment, or other, our team is here to help! Services provided by general dentists.

    We provide

    General Dentistry

    We offer complete dental care for all ages. From cleanings and examinations to fillings and preventative treatments, our goal is to keep your smile healthy!

    ​

    See Services List >

    We provide

    Cosmetic Dentistry

    We offer teeth whitening, veneers, and more to enhance your smile's appearance. We want  to help you feel confident in your smile wherever you go!

    ​

    See Services List >

    We provide

    Personalized Dental Care 

    Every smile has a unique story. That's why we personalize care, tailored to your needs, with a focus on comfort, prevention, and long-term health.

    ​

    See Services List >
